athletes.title: THE GOAT armwrestling Handle
athletes.summary:
By far, the tool that has helped me the most to develop pressure through the small finger and the bottom of my wrist has been the Multi-Spinner.

I use it in many different ways and with different handle sizes. All of these variations help, and everyone who has pulled with me on the table knows exactly what I mean.

If you want me to make a video showing the different exercise variations I do with it, let me know in the comments below.

You can get your own at Titan Grip @titangrip.de and use code VOA10 for a good discount.

athletes.title: I Lost 40lbs | Did It Cost Me My Strength Or Am I More Dangerous?
athletes.summary:
Thanks to The Feed for partnering with me! Shop The Feed — the world’s largest sports nutrition marketplace, where athletes get fed. Head to my link https://thefeed.yt.link/7lT4EXt for 40% of your first purchase!

Less than two weeks before East vs West 24, Monster Michael Todd needed answers. Is he still strong and powerful enough to beat the reigning Light Heavy Weight World Armwrestling Champion, Oleg Petrenko?

Over the last three months I've dropped nearly 40 pounds to make weight for my upcoming world title match. The weight is coming off exactly as planned.

But there was one question I couldn't answer until today.
Did I lose strength too?

This was my final heavy workout before the match, and I came into the gym determined to hit the biggest deadlift of my life.

What happened wasn't exactly what I expected.

But sometimes the biggest wins don't look the way you planned.

Let me know in the comments:

If you had to choose one, would you rather keep your strength or make weight?

#armwrestling #deadlift #strengthtraining #eastvswest #michaeltodd
